message:
test(renderer-3d): add 3D math utility tests

Add 48 tests covering all 3D math functions:
- Vector creation (vec3)
- Vector operations (add, sub, scale, dot, cross)
- Vector utilities (length, normalize)
- Matrix creation (identity)
- Rotation matrices (rotationX, rotationY, rotationZ)
- Matrix operations (multiply, transform)
- Combined rotation
- Perspective projection

Total tests: 387 -> 435

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
